name: Deshi Shahi Cow
description: Healthy Shahiwal cow suitable for Qurbani. Well fed with natural grass and organic grains in a village farm.

name: Black Bengal Goat
description: Premium quality Black Bengal goat. Known for its lean meat and active health. Raised in a domestic environment.

name: Australian Cross Cow
description: Huge Australian cross breed cow. Perfect for those looking for maximum weight and a healthy structure.

name: Jamunapari Goat
description: Tall and beautiful Jamunapari goat. High-quality breed with great physical appearance and health.

name: Brahman Bull
description: Exotic Brahman bull, exceptionally strong and heavy. Managed by expert vets and fed with premium silage.

name: Barbari Goat
description: Distinctive Barbari breed goat. Very healthy, energetic, and perfect for a medium-budget Qurbani.
